data.title: Consistency Heuristic
data.description: Ensures uniformity across design elements and interactions to enhance usability.
data.technical_spec: Design systems, UI frameworks, style guides

data.title: Fitts’s Law Implementation
data.description: Designs interfaces that minimize distance and maximize target size for quicker user actions.

data.title: Hick’s Law Awareness
data.description: Simplifies user decision-making by limiting the number of presented choices at once.

data.title: Usability Testing Protocols
data.description: Regular usability testing to assess and enhance user interactions and satisfaction.
data.technical_spec: A/B testing software, user feedback tools

data.title: Jakob’s Law Compliance
data.description: Designs interfaces based on users' experience with other familiar applications.
